fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the general ledger budget.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the general ledger budget name.

fields.name: Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the related record is blocked from being posted in transactions, for example a customer that is declared insolvent or an item that is placed in quarantine.

fields.name: Budget Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for a budget dimension. You can specify four additional dimensions on each budget that you create.

fields.name: Budget Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for a budget dimension. You can specify four additional dimensions on each budget that you create.

fields.name: Budget Dimension 3 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for a budget dimension. You can specify four additional dimensions on each budget that you create.

fields.name: Budget Dimension 4 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for a budget dimension. You can specify four additional dimensions on each budget that you create.
